name: Schema Fk Typecheck
summary: Before writing a CREATE TABLE column with a REFERENCES clause, look up the parent table's column type so the FK declaration matches. Catches BIGINT vs UUID,…
description: Before writing a CREATE TABLE column with a REFERENCES clause, look up the parent table's column type so the FK declaration matches. Catches BIGINT vs UUID, SERIAL vs BIGSERIAL, INTEGER vs TEXT mismatches at write time — not at production deploy.
author: marvelousempire
goal: Deliver schema fk typecheck output correctly and completely.
